items.title: Azteco
items.description: Azteco is a bitcoin voucher system for low-KYC onboarding. Buy a printed or digital voucher with cash or card, then redeem to any bitcoin address with no account registration.

items.title: Bitcoin Education
items.description: Overview of Bitcoin education resources, curricula, and pedagogical approaches for developers, users, and educators across technical and non-technical audiences.

items.title: Oshi App
items.description: Bitcoin rewards and marketing platform for local businesses. Replaces traditional loyalty stars, punch cards, and points with bitcoin-backed incentives.
